{{Quote|There's one with them who moves this storm. He brings this storm at his will, summons and directs it.|Be|<ref name="PoT" />}}
'''Be''' was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Theran Listener]] who worked as a healer.

==Biography==
After the resolution of the conflict with the [[Newcomer]]s, Be and [[Umolly Darm]] worked together to find [[Rock ivory]] and other valuable minerals on [[Nam Chorios/Legends|Nam Chorios]].<ref name="PoT" />

{{Char-stub}}

*''[[Planet of Twilight]]'' {{1st}}
